summary: Management accountant with 6 years of experience at Unilever Netherlands, transitioning from finance into sustainability. Most recently part of the sustainability reporting team supporting Unilever's annual Climate Transition Action Plan disclosure and TCFD-aligned reporting. Previously handled P&L consolidation and variance analysis for Benelux markets. Participated in Unilever's internal carbon footprint measurement pilot covering Scope 1 and Scope 2 emissions. CIMA qualified with strong Excel modelling capabilities. Passionate about climate action and eager to apply data and financial rigour to carbon accounting.

experience.title: Management Accountant — Sustainability Reporting
bullets: Supported preparation of Unilever's annual Climate Transition Action Plan (CTAP) and TCFD-aligned disclosures for external stakeholders
Built Excel models to consolidate Scope 1 and Scope 2 emissions data from 15 manufacturing sites across the Benelux region
Reconciled energy consumption records (natural gas, electricity, diesel) against financial data to support GHG Protocol calculations
Coordinated with PwC on limited assurance engagement for Unilever's annual sustainability report
Trained 8 site finance managers on emissions data collection processes and GHG Protocol methodology

experience.title: Management Accountant — Group Reporting (promoted from Graduate Trainee, 2022)
bullets: Performed monthly P&L consolidation for Unilever Benelux markets (EUR 2.1B revenue)
Prepared variance analysis and management commentary for quarterly business reviews
Built financial models analysing brand profitability across Home Care and Personal Care divisions
Completed CIMA qualification while working full-time (2020-2022)

certifications: CIMA — Chartered Institute of Management Accountants (2022)
GHG Protocol Corporate Standard — Self-study completion (2023)
